summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GharSetu v2.0 real estate marketplace - all backend APIs and frontend UI flows working excellently with minor development warnings

design_issues.issue: React SelectItem component error warnings in browser console
design_issues.description: Non-critical React component warnings appearing in console during category page navigation

passed_tests: Backend API health check (/api/health) - 100% success
Categories API (/api/categories) - returns all 5 categories with Gujarati translations
User registration (/api/auth/register) - creates user accounts successfully
Owner registration (/api/auth/register/owner) - creates owner accounts with Aadhar verification
User login (/api/auth/login) - authentication working correctly
Authenticated endpoints (/api/auth/me) - token validation working
Listings API (/api/listings) - returns property listings
Trending listings API (/api/listings/trending) - returns trending properties
AI Chatbot API (/api/chat) - GPT-5.2 integration working with Emergent key
Error handling (/api/nonexistent) - returns proper 404 errors
Home page loads with hero section, voice search button, categories, trending properties
All 5 category cards present with Gujarati translations (ઘર, બિઝનેસ, રહેવાનું, ઇવેન્ટ, સેવાઓ)
Voice search button functionality integrated
Hero search form with location input working - redirects to /search
User registration form with all required fields (name, email, phone, password, gender, city, address)
Owner registration with 4 owner types (Property Owner, Service Provider, Hotel Owner, Event Owner)
Owner registration includes Aadhar verification fields (number and name)
All owner type cards show Gujarati labels
Login form with email/password authentication
Navigation between User and Owner registration tabs
All 5 category pages load successfully (/category/home, /category/business, /category/stay, /category/event, /category/services)
Reels page accessibility (/reels)
Category navigation from home page cards working
Property cards display in trending section (4 cards found)
Responsive design and layout working properly
